creator: me@svmhdvn.name
text:
Created attachment 255933
[PATCH] cad/pcb: update to 4.3.0 and fix build without NLS

This patch updates cad/pcb to 4.3.0 and makes the following changes:
* move PORTDOCS declaration to pkg-plist for easier updates
* ensure gettext is always included as a dependency because the non NLS build also requires it
* move NLS declaration to pkg-plist
* refresh patches for 4.3.0

This patch also closes Bug 245300.
